shots.voice_es: Mamá olvidó tomar su medicamento. Otra vez.
shots.note: Open as black-on-charcoal still in CapCut. Hold 7s.

shots.voice_es: Y la familia, dispersa, nunca se enteró.
shots.subtitle_en: And the family, scattered, never knew.
shots.note: Same palette as problem-1 — sustains the heaviness.

shots.voice_es: Nagi reúne a la familia alrededor del mayor.
shots.subtitle_en: Nagi gathers the family around the elder.
shots.note: Tella capture: caregiver opens app → enters PIN → home. Auto-zoom on PIN entry.

shots.voice_es: Cada noche, la IA escribe el resumen del día. Quienes le aman, lo leen.
shots.subtitle_en: Every night, AI writes the day's digest. The people who love them read it.
shots.note: Tella capture: daily digest for Eleanor Pemberton. Scroll showing AI-written summary.

shots.voice_es: La familia responde con voz, foto, palabra. Y el mayor lo siente.
shots.subtitle_en: Family replies with voice, photo, words. And the elder feels it.
shots.note: Tella capture: care-circle reply (voice or photo) → cut to elder's screen receiving it.

shots.voice_es: Kasvu — el cuidado real, hecho visible. Como el mar en calma. 凪.
shots.subtitle_en: Kasvu — real care, made visible. Like the sea at rest. 凪.
shots.note: Single still exported from cards/brand.html (open in browser, screenshot at end of ink-reveal animation).

shots.voice_es: Pruébalo con tu familia. Demo en nagi punto kas punto vu — credenciales en pantalla.
shots.subtitle_en: Try it with your family. Demo at nagi.kas.vu — credentials on screen.
shots.note: Single still exported from cards/outro.html (QR + creds + footer credit).
